mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT TID, SYSNAME, PTPNAME, IN_OUT FROM MBA.TB_ROADM_OPTICAL_PERFORMANCE_DAILY WHERE COLLECTION_DATE = (NOW() - INTERVAL '1 DAYS')::DATE AND IN_OUT = 'IN' AND SPAN_LOSS IS NOT NULL

WITH HIST AS ( SELECT TRUNK_NAME, SYSNAME, PTPNAME, DIRECTION, NODE_TOTAL_DEVIATION FROM MBA.TB_ROADM_OPTICAL_PERFORMANCE_DAILY WHERE COLLECTION_DATE >= (DATE_TRUNC('DAY', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '14 DAYS') AND IN_OUT = 'IN' AND NODE_TOTAL_DEVIATION IS NOT NULL AND ABS(NODE_TOTAL_DEVIATION) < 8 ), CALIB AS ( SELECT TRUNK_NAME, SYSNAME, PTPNAME, DIRECTION , PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NODE_TOTAL_DEVIATION) AS BETA_MEDIAN , STDDEV_SAMP(NODE_TOTAL_DEVIATION) AS SIGMA_DEV FROM HIST GROUP BY TRUNK_NAME, SYSNAME, PTPNAME, DIRECTION ) SELECT COLLECTION_DATE, TRUNK_NAME, DIRECTION, SYSNAME FROM ( SELECT PD.COLLECTION_DATE, PD.TRUNK_NAME, PD.SYSNAME, PD.PTPNAME, PD.DIRECTION , PD.NODE_TOTAL_DEVIATION - COALESCE(C.BETA_MEDIAN, 0) AS NTD_VARIANCE2 , C.SIGMA_DEV FROM MBA.TB_ROADM_OPTICAL_PERFORMANCE_DAILY PD LEFT OUTER JOIN CALIB C ON PD.TRUNK_NAME = C.TRUNK_NAME AND PD.SYSNAME = C.SYSNAME AND PD.PTPNAME = C.PTPNAME AND PD.DIRECTION = C.DIRECTION WHERE COLLECTION_DATE > RCA.FC_GET_MINUS_DAY(1) ) PM WHERE ABS(NTD_VARIANCE2) > GREATEST(2.0, 3 * SIGMA_DEV)

SELECT DISTINCT ON(WPM.TRUNK_NAME, OPD.DIRECTION) WPM.TRUNK_NAME, WPM.TID, WPM.SYSNAME, WPM.PTPNAME, WPM.IN_OUT, WARNING_VALUE_MAX , OPD.DIRECTION, WPM.COLLECTION_DATE ::DATE, WPM.WARNING_DATE ::DATE FROM ( SELECT TRUNK_NAME, TID, SYSNAME, PTPNAME, IN_OUT, WARNING_VALUE_MAX, COLLECTION_DATE, WARNING_DATE, SEQ FROM ( SELECT ROR.TRUNK_NAME, AI.TID, AI.SYSNAME, AI.PTPNAME, AI.IN_OUT, ROR.REFERENCE_VALUE, AI.VALUE_MAX, (AI.VALUE_MAX - ROR.REFERENCE_VALUE) AS WARNING_VALUE_MAX , ABS(AI.VALUE_MAX - ROR.REFERENCE_VALUE) >= 3 AS IS_WARNING_VALUE_MAX , NOW() ::DATE - '1 DAY' ::INTERVAL AS COLLECTION_DATE, (NOW() ::DATE - '1 DAY' ::INTERVAL) + (AI.SEQ ::TEXT ||' DAY') ::INTERVAL AS WARNING_DATE , AI.SEQ FROM MBA.TB_PM_AI_PREDICT_RESULT AI LEFT OUTER JOIN MBA.TB_ROADM_OPTICAL_REFERENCE ROR ON AI.TID = ROR.TID AND AI.PTPNAME = ROR.PTPNAME AND AI.IN_OUT = ROR.IN_OUT ) PM WHERE IS_WARNING_VALUE_MAX = TRUE ) WPM LEFT OUTER JOIN MBA.TB_ROADM_OPTICAL_PERFORMANCE_DAILY OPD ON WPM.TID = OPD.TID AND WPM.PTPNAME = OPD.PTPNAME AND WPM.IN_OUT = OPD.IN_OUT AND WPM.COLLECTION_DATE = OPD.COLLECTION_DATE
LEFT OUTER JOIN MBA.TB_ROADM_PREDICTIVE_MAINTENANCE_TICKET PMT ON PMT.TRUNK_NAME = WPM.TRUNK_NAME AND PMT.DIRECTION = OPD.DIRECTION AND PMT.REASON = 'Node Total Deviation 변화' WHERE ((WPM.WARNING_DATE - NOW() ::DATE) <= '20 DAY'::::INTERVAL) = TRUE AND PMT.TICKETNO IS NULL
ORDER BY WPM.TRUNK_NAME, OPD.DIRECTION, WPM.WARNING_DATE, WPM.SEQ
